scripts.test:full: python -m pytest -q && npm run check:sync-static-root && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: npm run check:sync-static-root && npm run sync:static-root && playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:full: npm run check:sync-static-root && npm run sync:static-root && playwright test --reporter=line
scripts.test:e2e:responsive: npm run check:sync-static-root && npm run sync:static-root && playwright test tests/responsive-layout.spec.js --project=chromium --project=webkit-mobile --reporter=line
scripts.test:e2e:api-errors: npm run check:sync-static-root && npm run sync:static-root && playwright test tests/api-error-cases.spec.js --project=chromium --reporter=line
scripts.test:e2e:api-errors:local: npm run check:sync-static-root && npm run sync:static-root && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/run_playwright_with_local_server.ps1 tests/api-error-cases.spec.js chromium line
